title: Speaking - Part 4
description: You are going to read a magazine article about an intellectual process known as critical thinking...

content.task: Discussion on the definition of creativity and ownership.

questions.question: Can a piece of art be considered 'great' if it was created by a computer?
Do you think traditional art galleries will disappear in the future?
Is the high price of some modern art justified, or is it just marketing?

script.text: Some people say that art is only valuable if it requires physical skill. Do you agree?
